\tzpentry{ID11406}{Golden Portal State Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The candidate golden equilibrium state is achieved when phi-scaled surface tension balances inertial plus acoustic/field pressure contributions.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\mathrm{PortalState}=\frac{F_{s}\varphi}{F_{i}+F_{a}}=1
